mapper.select: SELECT id, house_id, item_group, item_code, item_name, standard_id, start_date, expire_date, last_date, money, standard_price, is_charged FROM pr_expense WHERE house_id = #{houseId} AND item_group = '6' AND del_flag = '0' ORDER BY start_date DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT DISTINCT house_id FROM pr_expense WHERE item_group = #{itemGroup} AND item_code = #{itemCode} AND del_flag = '0'
mapper.update: UPDATE pr_expense a LEFT JOIN pr_standard_price b ON b.standard_id = a.standard_id LEFT JOIN pr_house c ON c.id = a.house_id SET a.standard_price = b.standard_price, a.price_formula = b.price_formula, a.max_price = b.max_price WHERE a.org_id = #{orgId} AND a.is_calc = '0' AND b.grade = '1' AND a.del_flag = '0'

UPDATE pr_expense a LEFT JOIN pr_standard_price b ON b.standard_id = a.standard_id LEFT JOIN pr_house c ON c.id = a.house_id SET a.standard_price = b.standard_price, a.price_formula = b.price_formula, a.max_price = b.max_price WHERE a.standard_id = #{standardId} AND a.is_calc = '0' AND b.minimum <= c.gfloor_area AND b.maximum >= c.gfloor_area AND a.del_flag = '0'

UPDATE pr_expense a LEFT JOIN pr_standard_price b ON b.standard_id = a.standard_id LEFT JOIN pr_house c ON c.id = a.house_id SET a.standard_price = b.standard_price, a.price_formula = b.price_formula, a.max_price = b.max_price WHERE a.standard_id = #{standardId} AND a.is_calc = '0' AND b.minimum <= c.nfloor_area AND b.maximum >= c.nfloor_area AND a.del_flag = '0'

UPDATE pr_expense a LEFT JOIN pr_standard_price b ON b.standard_id = a.standard_id LEFT JOIN pr_house c ON c.id = a.house_id SET a.standard_price = b.standard_price, a.price_formula = b.price_formula, a.max_price = b.max_price WHERE a.standard_id = #{standardId} AND a.is_calc = '0' AND b.minimum <= c.floor AND b.maximum >= c.floor AND a.del_flag = '0'

UPDATE pr_expense a LEFT JOIN pr_house b ON b.id = a.house_id LEFT JOIN pr_standard c ON c.id = a.standard_id LEFT JOIN pr_standard_price d ON d.standard_id = a.standard_id LEFT JOIN pr_expense_item e ON e.item_code = c.item_code AND e.item_group = c.item_group AND e.org_id = c.org_id SET a.standard_price = IF(a.max_price = 0, ROUND(${a.price_formula}, e.price_precision), IF(ROUND(${a.price_formula}, e.price_precision) >= a.max_price, a.max_price, ROUND(${a.price_formula}, e.price_precision))) WHERE a.org_id = #{orgId} AND a.is_calc = '0' AND a.del_flag = '0'

UPDATE pr_expense a LEFT JOIN pr_house b ON b.id = a.house_id LEFT JOIN pr_standard c ON c.id = a.standard_id LEFT JOIN pr_standard_price d ON d.standard_id = a.standard_id LEFT JOIN pr_expense_item e ON e.item_group = c.item_group AND e.item_code = c.item_code AND e.org_id = c.org_id SET a.is_calc = '1', a.receivable = IF(a.max_money > '0' AND ROUND(${a.money_formula}, e.money_precision) >= a.max_money, a.max_money, ROUND(${a.money_formula}, e.money_precision)), a.final_money = ROUND( IF(a.max_money > '0' AND ROUND(${a.money_formula}, e.money_precision) >= a.max_money, a.max_money, ROUND(${a.money_formula}, e.money_precision)) - a.preferential - a.deduction + a.latefee, e.money_precision) WHERE a.org_id = #{orgId} AND a.is_calc = '0' AND a.del_flag = '0'

UPDATE pr_expense a LEFT JOIN pr_house b ON b.id = a.house_id LEFT JOIN pm_standard c ON c.id = a.standard_id SET a.is_calc = '1', a.receivable = IF(a.max_money > '0' AND ROUND(${a.money_formula}, '2') >= a.max_money, a.max_money, ROUND(${a.money_formula}, '2')), a.final_money = ROUND( IF(a.max_money > '0' AND ROUND(${a.money_formula}, '2') >= a.max_money, a.max_money, ROUND(${a.money_formula}, '2')) - a.preferential - a.deduction + a.latefee, '2') WHERE a.org_id = #{orgId} AND a.is_calc = '0' AND a.del_flag = '0'
UPDATE pr_house SET is_calc = '1' WHERE id = #{houseId}
mapper.select: SELECT id, name, item_code, item_group, cycles, generate_rule, step_type, statistics_type, step_maxgrade, is_step2, step2_type, step2_maxgrade, is_latefee, latefee_startdate, latefee_type, latefee_startdays, latefee_formula, is_limited, limited_type, limited_cond, limited_times, limited_money, limited_single_money, standard_price, money_formula, max_money, org_id FROM pr_standard WHERE id = #{standardId}

SELECT a.id, a.code AS parkingCode, a.house_id, e.user_name AS userName, '7' AS itemGroup, '701' AS itemCode, a.standard_id, a.org_id, b.room_num AS roomNum, IFNULL(g.expire_date, a.establish_time) AS openTime, c.name AS standardName, c.standard_price AS standardPrice FROM pm_parking_space a LEFT JOIN pr_house b ON b.id = a.house_id LEFT JOIN pm_standard c ON c.id = a.standard_id LEFT JOIN pr_user_house uh ON uh.house_id = a.house_id AND uh.del_flag = '0' LEFT JOIN pr_user e ON uh.user_id = e.id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT parking_space_id, MAX(expire_date) AS expire_date FROM pr_expense WHERE del_flag = '0' GROUP BY parking_space_id ) g ON g.parking_space_id = a.id WHERE a.org_id = #{orgId} AND b.building_id = #{buildingId} AND b.unit_code = #{unitCode} AND '7' = #{itemGroup} AND a.parking_id = #{parkingId} AND (b.room_num LIKE CONCAT('%', #{search}, '%') OR a.code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{search}, '%'))

SELECT a.id, a.house_id, a.item_group, a.item_code, a.standard_id, b.building_id AS buildingId, b.unit_code AS unitCode FROM pr_house_expense a LEFT JOIN pr_house b ON b.id = a.house_id WHERE a.org_id = #{orgId} AND b.room_num = TRIM(#{search})
mapper.update: UPDATE pr_expense a LEFT JOIN pr_standard b ON b.id = a.standard_id LEFT JOIN pr_expense_item c ON c.item_group = b.item_group AND c.item_code = b.item_code SET a.latefee = ROUND( (${latefeeFormula}) * IF(DATEDIFF(CURRENT_DATE, DATE_ADD(a.start_date, INTERVAL b.latefee_startdays DAY)) <= 0, 0, DATEDIFF(CURRENT_DATE, DATE_ADD(a.start_date, INTERVAL b.latefee_startdays DAY))), c.money_precision), a.overdue_day = IF(DATEDIFF(CURRENT_DATE, DATE_ADD(a.start_date, INTERVAL b.latefee_startdays DAY)) <= 0, 0, DATEDIFF(CURRENT_DATE, DATE_ADD(a.start_date, INTERVAL b.latefee_startdays DAY))) WHERE a.org_id = #{orgId} AND b.id = #{standardId} AND a.is_charged = '0' AND a.is_calc = '1' AND DATE_FORMAT(a.start_date, '%Y-%m') < DATE_FORMAT(CURRENT_DATE, '%Y-%m') AND a.del_flag = '0'

UPDATE pr_expense a LEFT JOIN pr_standard b ON b.id = a.standard_id LEFT JOIN pr_expense_item c ON c.item_group = b.item_group AND c.item_code = b.item_code SET a.latefee = ROUND( (${latefeeFormula}) * IF(DATEDIFF(CURRENT_DATE, DATE_ADD(a.expire_date, INTERVAL b.latefee_startdays DAY)) <= 0, 0, DATEDIFF(CURRENT_DATE, DATE_ADD(a.expire_date, INTERVAL b.latefee_startdays DAY))), c.money_precision), a.overdue_day = IF(DATEDIFF(CURRENT_DATE, DATE_ADD(a.expire_date, INTERVAL b.latefee_startdays DAY)) <= 0, 0, DATEDIFF(CURRENT_DATE, DATE_ADD(a.expire_date, INTERVAL b.latefee_startdays DAY))) WHERE a.org_id = #{orgId} AND b.id = #{standardId} AND a.is_charged = '0' AND a.is_calc = '1' AND DATE_FORMAT(a.expire_date, '%Y-%m') < DATE_FORMAT(CURRENT_DATE, '%Y-%m') AND a.del_flag = '0'

UPDATE pr_expense a LEFT JOIN pr_standard b ON b.id = a.standard_id LEFT JOIN pr_expense_item c ON c.item_group = b.item_group AND c.item_code = b.item_code SET a.latefee = ROUND( (${latefeeFormula}) * IF(DATEDIFF(CURRENT_DATE, DATE_ADD(b.latefee_startdate, INTERVAL b.latefee_startdays DAY)) <= 0, 0, DATEDIFF(CURRENT_DATE, DATE_ADD(b.latefee_startdate, INTERVAL b.latefee_startdays DAY))), c.money_precision), a.overdue_day = IF(DATEDIFF(CURRENT_DATE, DATE_ADD(b.latefee_startdate, INTERVAL b.latefee_startdays DAY)) <= 0, 0, DATEDIFF(CURRENT_DATE, DATE_ADD(b.latefee_startdate, INTERVAL b.latefee_startdays DAY))) WHERE a.org_id = #{orgId} AND b.id = #{standardId} AND a.is_charged = '0' AND a.is_calc = '1' AND DATE_FORMAT(b.latefee_startdate, '%Y-%m') < DATE_FORMAT(CURRENT_DATE, '%Y-%m') AND a.del_flag = '0'

UPDATE pr_expense a LEFT JOIN pr_standard b ON b.id = a.standard_id LEFT JOIN pr_expense_item c ON c.item_group = b.item_group AND c.item_code = b.item_code SET a.latefee = ROUND( (${latefeeFormula}) * IF((DATEDIFF(CURRENT_DATE, DATE_ADD(a.start_date, INTERVAL b.latefee_startdays DAY)) - '30') <= 0, 0, (DATEDIFF(CURRENT_DATE, DATE_ADD(a.start_date, INTERVAL b.latefee_startdays DAY)) - '30')), c.money_precision), a.overdue_day = IF((DATEDIFF(CURRENT_DATE, DATE_ADD(a.start_date, INTERVAL b.latefee_startdays DAY)) - '30') <= 0, 0, (DATEDIFF(CURRENT_DATE, DATE_ADD(a.start_date, INTERVAL b.latefee_startdays DAY)) - '30')) WHERE a.org_id = #{orgId} AND b.id = #{standardId} AND a.is_charged = '0' AND a.is_calc = '1' AND a.year = #{year} AND a.month = #{month} AND a.del_flag = '0'

UPDATE pr_expense a LEFT JOIN pr_standard b ON b.id = a.standard_id LEFT JOIN pr_expense_item c ON c.item_group = a.item_group AND c.item_code = a.item_code AND c.org_id = a.org_id SET a.final_money = ROUND(a.receivable - a.preferential - a.deduction + a.latefee, c.money_precision) WHERE a.org_id = #{orgId} AND a.is_charged = '0' AND a.is_calc = '1' AND b.id = #{standardId} AND a.del_flag = '0'

UPDATE pr_expense SET paid_in = #{paidIn}, final_money = #{paidIn}, is_charged = 1, charged_time = NOW(), record_id = #{recordId}, update_by = #{openId}, update_time = NOW() WHERE house_id = #{houseId} AND year = #{year} AND is_charged = 0 AND del_flag = '0'
